zh.Martock, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特馬托可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William de Fiennes於大約1160年出生在英國薩默塞特馬托可時，他的父親Enguerrand de Fiennes34歲，母親Sybille de Boulogne31歲。他於大約1196年與Agnès de DAMMARTIN結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1241年登記服兵役。他去世於1240年4月7日在巴勒斯坦享年81歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒拉 巴瑟。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord William de Fiennes于大约1160年出生在英国薩默塞特馬托可时，他的父亲Enguerrand de Fiennes34岁，母亲Sybille de Boulogne31岁。他于大约1196年与Agnès de DAMMARTIN结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1241年登记服兵役。他去世于1240年4月7日在巴勒斯坦享年81岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒拉 巴瑟。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William de Fiennes was born about 1160, in Martock, Somerset, England, his father, Enguerrand de Fiennes, was 34 and his mother, Sybille de Boulogne, was 31. He married Agnès de DAMMARTIN about 1196. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1241. He died on 7 April 1240, in Palestine, at the age of 81, and was buried in La Bassée, Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William de Fiennes est né environ 1160, à Martock, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Enguerrand de Fiennes, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Sybille de Boulogne, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de DAMMARTIN environ 1196. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1241. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1240, à Palestine, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à La Bassée, Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.Nord (La Bassée, Duchy Lille), Nord-Pas-: La Bassée, Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William de Fiennes um 1160 in Martock, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Enguerrand de Fiennes 34 und seine Mutter Sybille de Boulogne 31. Er hat um 1196 Agnès de DAMMARTIN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1241 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 7. April 1240 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in La Bassée, Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William de Fiennes è nato il circa 1160 nel Martock, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Enguerrand de Fiennes, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Sybille de Boulogne, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de DAMMARTIN circa 1196. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1241. Morì il 7 aprile 1240, nel Palestina, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a La Bassée, Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord William de Fiennesが約1160年にイギリスソメルセトマルトックで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Fiennesは34歳，母Sybille de Boulogneは31歳であった。約1196年にAgnès de DAMMARTINと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1241年に兵役登録をした。彼は1240年4月7日にパレスチナで81歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードリルラ バスeにて埋葬された。

ko.Nord (La Bassée, Duchy Lille), Nord-Pas-: 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 릴 라 배스e
ko.lifeSummary: Lord William de Fiennes(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 서머세트 마톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Enguerrand de Fiennes(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybille de Boulogne(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1196년 Agnès de DAMMARTIN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1240년 4월 7일 팔레스타인에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 릴 라 배스e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William de Fiennes nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Martock, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Sybille de Boulogne, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de DAMMARTIN aproximadamente 1196. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1241. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1240, em Palestina, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em La Bassée, Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.Nord (La Bassée, Duchy Lille), Nord-Pas-: ла бассe, лилл, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William de Fiennes родился около 1160 г. в местности мартокк, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Enguerrand de Fiennes было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Sybille de Boulogne, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de DAMMARTIN около 1196 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1241 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 7 апреля 1240 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности ла бассe, лилл, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord William de Fiennes nació aproximadamente 1160, en Martock, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Sybille de Boulogne, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnès de DAMMARTIN aproximadamente 1196. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1241. Murió el 7 de abril de 1240, en Palestina, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en La Bassée, Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
